slides.caption: A Friendly Chat for Our Club Members
slides.heading: Taking Care of Your Hearing
slides.notes: Welcome everyone warmly. Remind them we are among friends.

columns: Asking others to repeat themselves often
Turning up the TV louder than before
Straining to follow conversations at dinner
slides.heading: Early Signs You Might Notice
slides.notes: Pose gently: 'Have you noticed any of these at the club or home?'

slides.heading: Why a Simple Check Matters
slides.notes: Emphasize that it's not a medical ordeal, just a friendly visit.

points.body: A quick test tells you exactly where you stand.
points.label: Peace of Mind

points.body: Hearing well keeps you in the stories and laughs.
points.label: Stay Connected

points.body: Modern checks are comfortable and take minutes.
points.label: Easy and Painless

slides.heading: What Happens If We Wait
slides.notes: Be caring, not alarming. Highlight the good news column.

slides.body: Come by our clinic for a gentle, free hearing check. ~~No fuss~~ **It's a pleasure to help.** ==Stay part of the conversation.==
slides.heading: You Deserve to Hear the Laughter
slides.notes: Close with a smile. Offer to walk over together after the talk.

title: Hearing Health for Our Members
voice: elderly country club members - informative and encouraging
